title: V8 Sandbox Bypass: OOB write in JsonStringifier::TrySerializeSimplePropertyKey
bounty_rationale: report of V8 sandbox bypass demonstrating memory corruption outside the V8 heap sandbox
description_snippet:
#### VULNERABILITY DETAILS
During the serialization of an internalized string, an out-of-bounds write may occur due to an integer overflow in the buffer length check.

```c++
template <typename DestChar>
bool JsonStringifier::TrySerializeSimplePropertyKey(
    Tagged<String> key, const DisallowGarba
